mapper.select: insert into am_archive_fonds (fonds_code, fonds_name, enabled, sort_order) values (#{fondsCode}, #{fondsName}, #{enabled}, #{sortOrder}) returning id
mapper.update: update am_archive_fonds set fonds_code = #{fondsCode}, fonds_name = #{fondsName}, enabled = #{enabled}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
update am_archive_fonds set deleted_flag = true, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.select: select id, fonds_code as "fondsCode", fonds_name as "fondsName", enabled, sort_order as "sortOrder", created_at as "createdAt", updated_at as "updatedAt" from am_archive_fonds where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false

select id, fonds_code as "fondsCode", fonds_name as "fondsName", enabled, sort_order as "sortOrder", created_at as "createdAt", updated_at as "updatedAt" from am_archive_fonds where fonds_code = #{fondsCode} and deleted_flag = false

insert into am_archive_category (parent_id, category_code, category_name, management_mode, enabled, sort_order) values (#{parentId}, #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{managementMode}, #{enabled}, #{sortOrder}) returning id
mapper.update: update am_archive_category set parent_id = #{parentId}, category_code = #{categoryCode}, category_name = #{categoryName}, management_mode = #{managementMode}, enabled = #{enabled}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
update am_archive_category set deleted_flag = true, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.select: select id, parent_id as "parentId", category_code as "categoryCode", category_name as "categoryName", management_mode as "managementMode", volume_table_name as "volumeTableName", item_table_name as "itemTableName", table_status as "tableStatus", built_at as "builtAt", enabled, sort_order as "sortOrder", created_at as "createdAt", updated_at as "updatedAt" from am_archive_category where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
select parent_id from am_archive_category where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
select count(*) from am_archive_category where parent_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false

insert into am_archive_field (category_id, archive_level, field_code, field_name, field_type, column_name, text_length, decimal_precision, decimal_scale, edit_control, list_visible, list_width, list_sort_order, detail_visible, detail_col_span, detail_sort_order, edit_visible, edit_col_span, edit_sort_order, exact_searchable, full_text_searchable, enabled, sort_order) values (#{categoryId}, #{archiveLevel}, #{fieldCode}, #{fieldName}, #{fieldType}, #{columnName}, #{textLength}, #{decimalPrecision}, #{decimalScale}, #{editControl}, #{listVisible}, #{listWidth}, #{listSortOrder}, #{detailVisible}, #{detailColSpan}, #{detailSortOrder}, #{editVisible}, #{editColSpan}, #{editSortOrder}, #{exactSearchable}, #{fullTextSearchable}, #{enabled}, #{sortOrder}) returning id
mapper.update: update am_archive_field set archive_level = #{archiveLevel}, field_code = #{fieldCode}, field_name = #{fieldName}, column_name = #{columnName}, text_length = #{textLength}, decimal_precision = #{decimalPrecision}, decimal_scale = #{decimalScale}, edit_control = #{editControl}, list_visible = #{listVisible}, list_width = #{listWidth}, list_sort_order = #{listSortOrder}, detail_visible = #{detailVisible}, detail_col_span = #{detailColSpan}, detail_sort_order = #{detailSortOrder}, edit_visible = #{editVisible}, edit_col_span = #{editColSpan}, edit_sort_order = #{editSortOrder}, exact_searchable = #{exactSearchable}, full_text_searchable = #{fullTextSearchable}, enabled = #{enabled}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and category_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false
update am_archive_field set deleted_flag = true, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and category_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.select: select id, category_id as "categoryId", archive_level as "archiveLevel", field_code as "fieldCode", field_name as "fieldName", field_type as "fieldType", column_name as "columnName", text_length as "textLength", decimal_precision as "decimalPrecision", decimal_scale as "decimalScale", edit_control as "editControl", list_visible as "listVisible", list_width as "listWidth", list_sort_order as "listSortOrder", detail_visible as "detailVisible", detail_col_span as "detailColSpan", detail_sort_order as "detailSortOrder", edit_visible as "editVisible", edit_col_span as "editColSpan", edit_sort_order as "editSortOrder", exact_searchable as "exactSearchable", full_text_searchable as "fullTextSearchable", enabled, sort_order as "sortOrder", created_at as "createdAt", updated_at as "updatedAt" from am_archive_field where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.update: ${sql}

update am_archive_category set item_table_name = case when #{archiveLevel} = 'ITEM' then #{tableName} else item_table_name end, volume_table_name = case when #{archiveLevel} = 'VOLUME' then #{tableName} else volume_table_name end, table_status = #{tableStatus}, built_at = localtimestamp, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.select: select id, archive_level, parent_id, fonds_code, fonds_name, category_code, category_name, archive_no, electronic_status, archive_year, display_order, locked_flag, lock_reason, locked_by, locked_at from am_archive_record where deleted_flag = false order by sort_order, id desc

select r.id, r.fonds_code ${selectColumns} from am_archive_record r join ${tableName} d on d.id = r.id where r.deleted_flag = false and d.deleted_flag = false and r.archive_level = #{archiveLevel} order by r.id

insert into am_archive_record (archive_level, parent_id, fonds_code, fonds_name, category_code, category_name, archive_no, electronic_status, archive_year) values (#{archiveLevel}, #{parentId}, #{fondsCode}, #{fondsName}, #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{archiveNo}, #{electronicStatus}, #{archiveYear}) returning id
mapper.update: update am_archive_record set archive_no = #{archiveNo}, parent_id = #{parentId}, fonds_code = #{fondsCode}, fonds_name = #{fondsName}, electronic_status = #{electronicStatus}, archive_year = #{archiveYear}, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false and locked_flag = false
mapper.select: select id, archive_level as "archiveLevel", parent_id as "parentId", fonds_code as "fondsCode", fonds_name as "fondsName", category_code as "categoryCode", category_name as "categoryName", archive_no as "archiveNo", electronic_status as "electronicStatus", archive_year as "archiveYear", locked_flag as "lockedFlag", lock_reason as "lockReason", locked_by as "lockedBy", locked_at as "lockedAt" from am_archive_record where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false

select id, archive_record_id as "archiveRecordId", physical_status as "physicalStatus", box_no as "boxNo", location_no as "locationNo", barcode, remark, created_at as "createdAt", updated_at as "updatedAt" from am_archive_physical_object where archive_record_id = #{archiveRecordId} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.insert: insert into am_archive_physical_object (archive_record_id, physical_status, box_no, location_no, barcode, remark, created_by, updated_by) values (#{archiveRecordId}, #{physicalStatus}, #{boxNo}, #{locationNo}, #{barcode}, #{remark}, #{userId}, #{userId}) on conflict (archive_record_id) where deleted_flag = false do update set physical_status = excluded.physical_status, box_no = excluded.box_no, location_no = excluded.location_no, barcode = excluded.barcode, remark = excluded.remark, updated_by = excluded.updated_by, updated_at = localtimestamp

insert into am_archive_record_audit (source_table_name, source_record_id, archive_record_id, fonds_code, category_code, operation_type, operation_reason, operated_by) values (#{sourceTableName}, #{sourceRecordId}, #{archiveRecordId}, #{fondsCode}, #{categoryCode}, #{operationType}, #{operationReason}, #{operatedBy})
mapper.update: update am_archive_record set deleted_flag = true, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false and locked_flag = false

update am_archive_record set locked_flag = true, lock_reason = #{lockReason}, locked_by = #{lockedBy}, locked_at = localtimestamp, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
update am_archive_record set locked_flag = false, lock_reason = null, locked_by = null, locked_at = null, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.insert: insert into am_archive_record_search (archive_record_id, search_text, index_version) values (#{archiveRecordId}, #{searchText}, #{indexVersion}) on conflict (archive_record_id) do update set search_text = excluded.search_text, index_version = excluded.index_version, updated_at = localtimestamp
mapper.select: select id, archive_record_id as "archiveRecordId", event_type as "eventType" from am_archive_record_search_outbox where status = 'PENDING' and (next_retry_at is null or next_retry_at <= localtimestamp) order by id limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update am_archive_record_search_outbox set status = 'PROCESSED', processed_at = localtimestamp, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id}

update am_archive_record_search_outbox set status = 'PENDING', attempts = attempts + 1, last_error = #{lastError}, next_retry_at = localtimestamp + interval '1 minute', updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select archive_record_id as "archiveRecordId", search_text <@> #{keyword} as score from am_archive_record_search where search_text @@@ #{keyword} order by score, archive_record_id desc

select id, category_id as "categoryId", archive_level as "archiveLevel", constraint_code as "constraintCode", constraint_name as "constraintName", include_fonds as "includeFonds", index_name as "indexName", enabled, created_at as "createdAt", updated_at as "updatedAt" from am_archive_unique_constraint where category_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false order by archive_level, id

select id, category_id as "categoryId", archive_level as "archiveLevel", constraint_code as "constraintCode", constraint_name as "constraintName", include_fonds as "includeFonds", index_name as "indexName", enabled, created_at as "createdAt", updated_at as "updatedAt" from am_archive_unique_constraint where id = #{id} and deleted_flag = false

insert into am_archive_unique_constraint (category_id, archive_level, constraint_code, constraint_name, include_fonds, index_name, enabled) values (#{categoryId}, #{archiveLevel}, #{constraintCode}, #{constraintName}, #{includeFonds}, #{indexName}, #{enabled}) returning id
mapper.update: update am_archive_unique_constraint set archive_level = #{archiveLevel}, constraint_code = #{constraintCode}, constraint_name = #{constraintName}, include_fonds = #{includeFonds}, index_name = #{indexName}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and category_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false
update am_archive_unique_constraint set deleted_flag = true, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{id} and category_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false
mapper.insert: insert into am_archive_unique_constraint_field (constraint_id, field_id, field_order) values (#{constraintId}, #{fieldId}, #{fieldOrder})
mapper.select: select rf.id, rf.constraint_id as "constraintId", rf.field_id as "fieldId", rf.field_order as "fieldOrder", f.archive_level as "archiveLevel", f.field_code as "fieldCode", f.field_name as "fieldName", f.column_name as "columnName" from am_archive_unique_constraint_field rf join am_archive_field f on f.id = rf.field_id and f.deleted_flag = false where rf.constraint_id = #{constraintId} order by rf.field_order, rf.id
mapper.update:
update am_archive_field set exact_searchable = true, updated_at = localtimestamp where category_id = #{categoryId} and deleted_flag = false and id in
#{fieldId}
mapper.insert: insert into am_archive_field_layout (category_id, surface, owner_user_id, field_id, visible, list_width, col_span, row_order, col_order) values (#{categoryId}, #{surface}, #{ownerUserId}, #{fieldId}, #{visible}, #{listWidth}, #{colSpan}, #{rowOrder}, #{colOrder})
mapper.update: update am_archive_record set parent_id = #{volumeId}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, updated_at = localtimestamp where id = #{archiveRecordId} and archive_level = 'ITEM' and deleted_flag = false and locked_flag = false
